rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The cited rule governs criminal history reviews of substitute teachers. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 22.0836. NATIONAL CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD INFORMATION REVIEW OF SUBSTITUTE TEACHERS.
_note: No conflict: proposed homestead exemption change has no nexus to substitute teacher criminal history review statute.
